title: genista triacanthos var. oxycedrina
intro: Genista triacanthos var. oxycedrina, also known as the prickly broom or oxycedra, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress. Genista triacanthos var. oxycedrina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
